rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1076 governs department loan funding sources. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2306.1076. FUNDING. (a) The department shall ensure that a loan under this section is structured in a way that complies with any requirements associated with the source of the funds used for the loan.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no cross-reference to Tax Code §11.13(b) found.
